design_principles: Strict Minimalism: Typography and spacing only. Absolutely NO icons, NO illustrations, and NO emojis.
High-Contrast & Refined: Pure structural grayscale for hierarchy to emulate a serious, high-end compliance tool (like Linear/Vercel but darker).
Mobile-First & Persistent Navigation: Bottom navigation must always be visible on mobile, using text-only tabs.
Function over Form: Clear status texts, large text-based tap targets for 'CHECK IN' and essential actions.
Italian Language strictly applied across all user interfaces.

headings.rules: Sharp, structural, uppercase for section headers. High tension, tight tracking (tracking-tighter).

monospace.rules: Crucial for credentials, dates, OCR data, ID numbers, and system statuses.

layout.spacing_system: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12). Generous padding inside cards (p-6) to let typography breathe.

navigation.classes: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-16 bg-[#05050A]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#1E1E28] flex justify-around items-center z-50
navigation.style: Text only, no icons. Active item: 'text-zinc-100 font-bold'. Inactive item: 'text-zinc-500 text-sm'.

layout.main_container: w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto pb-24 pt-8 px-4 sm:px-6 flex flex-col gap-8

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-100 text-[#05050A] font-medium px-6 py-4 rounded-none uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-white active:scale-[0.98] transition-all w-full text-center cursor-pointer
buttons.secondary: border border-[#1E1E28] bg-transparent text-zinc-300 px-6 py-4 rounded-none uppercase tracking-wide hover:border-zinc-500 transition-colors w-full text-center cursor-pointer
buttons.check_in_hero: w-full h-32 flex items-center justify-center bg-zinc-100 text-[#05050A] text-3xl font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-white active:scale-[0.98] transition-all rounded-none mb-8 cursor-pointer

components.inputs: bg-transparent border border-[#1E1E28] rounded-none px-4 py-3 text-zinc-100 placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:border-zinc-300 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-300 outline-none transition-all w-full font-mono
components.status_indicator: Use typographic brackets and monospace for status. Example: '[ OK ]' in text-emerald-500, '[ ERR ]' in text-red-500. No colored dots, strictly text.
components.file_upload: border-2 border-dashed border-[#1E1E28] bg-[#0E0E14] p-12 flex items-center justify-center hover:border-zinc-500 transition-colors cursor-pointer text-zinc-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm text-center w-full

workflow_views.login: Minimalist centered layout. Huge 'OSPITALO' logotype. Action: 'ACCEDI CON GOOGLE' text button. No Google icon.
workflow_views.dashboard: Prominent 'CHECK IN' giant hero button at the top. Below, a monospace log of recent submissions showing portal statuses.
check_in_wizard: 1. Date Selection: 'DATA ARRIVO' and 'DATA PARTENZA' text inputs.
2. Property Selection: Text-based vertical list of properties.
3. Upload ID: Large dashed box 'CARICA FOTO DOCUMENTO' for OCR.
4. Data Review: Monospace grid of parsed guest data (Nome, Cognome, Documento). Editable standard inputs.
5. Submit: Progress console displaying 'INVIO ALLOGGIATI WEB...', 'INVIO ROSS 1000...' with real-time success/error feedback.
workflow_views.settings: Property management list. Inside property: Input credentials for 'Alloggiati Web', 'Ross 1000', 'Imposta Soggiorno'. Test vs Production toggle implemented as text: '[ TEST ] / [ PROD ]'.
workflow_views.archive: List of past guests with submission statuses. Action: 'SCARICA RICEVUTA (PDF)' (text link only).

interactions.hover: Text color brightens, border color lightens. No background color shifts on secondary elements.
interactions.focus: High contrast white/zinc-300 borders or 1px rings.
interactions.motion: Brutally minimal. 150ms ease-in-out opacities only. No bouncy scales.

media.instructions: STRICTLY NO ICONS, NO IMAGES, NO LOGOS (not even Google's logo), NO EMOJIS anywhere in the application. Use pure typographical symbols like +, -, [, ], / if absolutely necessary for UI structure.
